ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the index (e.g., ARI1, CRI1) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the index (e.g., #FF0000, #FFFF00) */,
  "formula" INTEGER /* ID of the formula used to calculate the index */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the index */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Description or notes about the index */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format of the index (e.g., CSV, Excel, GeoTIFF) */,
  "common_range" TEXT /* Common range of values for the index */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the index */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the index */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the index */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indices_formula FOREIGN KEY ("formula") REFERENCES formulas ("formula_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indices_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formulas" (
  "formula_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formula */,
  "formula_text" TEXT /* Text representation of the formula (e.g., (1/W550) - (1/W700)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the formula and its application */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the formula */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the formula was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the formula */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the formula was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formula_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the researcher belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher was added to the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the researcher's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team's focus and goals */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the team */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., raw data, processed data) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the index */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
